name: Altius Minerals Corporation
description: Altius Minerals Corporation is a St. John's, Newfoundland-based diversified mining royalty and project generation company holding royalty and streaming interests in 13 producing assets across copper, nickel, cobalt, lithium, potash, and iron ore. The company generates royalty income from a portfolio that includes six potash mines in Saskatchewan and the Voisey's Bay nickel-copper-cobalt mine in Labrador, while its project generation arm continuously creates new royalties by exploring, staking, and vending out early-stage mineral projects. Altius is a royalty company—not an operator—with a strategy built on per-share growth through diversified, long-life royalty assets.
